Package jGameLib.ecs.ui2d.rendering

Class UIRendererComponent

java.lang.Object
jGameLib.ecs.Component
jGameLib.ecs.ui2d.rendering.UIRendererComponent
All Implemented Interfaces:

Direct Known Subclasses:

public abstract class UIRendererComponent extends Component implements HasBoundingBox
